title: refactor: use serde_json in vault GET instead of custom navigator
description: vault GET uses extract_path_field/extract_path (secretx-core custom navigator) to avoid serde_json allocations. But resp.bytes() returns bytes::Bytes which is not zeroed on drop — the full JSON response including the secret already sits in unzeroized heap memory before the navigator runs. The custom navigator only prevents *additional* serde allocations on top of a copy that already leaked. Replace with serde_json::from_slice for simplicity. vault already uses serde_json for PUT, so the dependency is already present.
